3321410.name: Keep Chopping!
3321410.description:
Compete for forest supremacy in Keep Chopping! In this fast-paced local multiplayer game, players plant trees to gain control of the screen while sabotaging their rivals. Gather Acorns by chopping trees, then decide whether to plant new ones or spend them on bonuses to defend your forest or attack your opponents.

Golden Acorns add another layer of depth, offering upgrades that can completely change how you play. Stack upgrades for wild combos and experience the chaos as the match escalates.

Designed for short, high-energy matches, Keep Chopping! is perfect for quick gaming sessions during coffee breaks or downtime.

  • Competitive Gameplay: Plant trees to gain points and sabotage your rivals to keep your lead.

  • Resource Management: Choose between expanding your forest or using bonuses for offense and defense.

  • Golden Acorns: Unlock upgrades that shape your strategy and stack for chaotic effects.

  • Quick and Accessible: Short matches make it easy to jump in and play anytime.
3321410.supported_languages: 英语, 乌克兰语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
